constructor.details: Constructor sets the initial owner (house) and minimum bet.

finalizeSpin().details: 2nd step: Finalize the spin, using blockhash(spinBlockNumber) as our pseudo-random seed. You must wait until AFTER `spinBlockNumber` is mined (i.e., block >= spinBlockNumber). If you wait too long (> 256 blocks), blockhash will return bytes32(0).

getCurrentBets().details: For large arrays, consider pagination or other indexing to avoid gas limit issues.

params.number: The roulette number on which the user wants to bet (0-36).

spinWheel().details: 1st step: Schedule the spin. We'll wait 7 blocks, then finalize. - Sets spinBlockNumber = current block + 7. - That means in ~7 blocks from now, `finalizeSpin()` can fetch the blockhash.
